case_title: BELTRAN, TOMASA VS O' NEAL, ROBERT ALLEN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BELTRAN, TOMASA AS TO DEFENDANT O' NEAL, ROBERT ALLEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-07-1994 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT O' NEAL, ROBERT ALLEN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BELTRAN, TOMASA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT O' NEAL, ROBERT ALLEN $1,212.63 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,227.63 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR BELTRAN, TOMASA ASSIGNED TO FRANKLIN,KILLEN & SAWYER
MEMO OF COSTS FILED, SENT TO SUE FOR APPROVAL OR HEARING SCHEDULE.
MOTION COURT'S OWN MOTION TO TAX COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT O' NEAL, ROBERT ALLEN HEARING SET FOR FEB-06-1997 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
HRG. ON MOTION TO TAX COSTS IS ON 2-6-97 @ 11:00AM NOT 8:30 *********SEE FILE***************
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION COURT'S OWN MOTION TO TAX COSTS CONTINUED FROM FEB-06-1997 TO FEB-27-1997 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C

SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION COURT'S OWN MOTION TO TAX COSTS OF FEB-27-1997, GRANTED
ORIGINAL RULING ON MOTION SIGNED BY SLOAN IS IN FANNY'S DESK. UTL FOLDER.
PER ORDER OF COMM DATED 3/13/97, MOTION GRANTED IN THE AMT OF $419.18 (INT. OF $319.18) PLUS SERVICE OF SUPPLEMENTARY PROCEEDINGS IN THE AMT OF $100.
